summary: Read the provided autonomous live PR inventory job and compacted preflight/fix artifacts. No GitHub mutations are planned: instant close, low-signal close, fix PRs, and merges are disabled by the job. The shard has no shared canonical; open candidate PRs are classified independently where safe, with maintainer/author/proof/check gates preserved as evidence. Security-sensitive refs are quarantined separately with exact route_security actions, including #86088 per deterministic validator failure.

actions.reason: Keep open for maintainer review; this inventory job cannot merge or repair the PR.

Route exact security-sensitive PR #86088 to central OpenClaw security handling; do not mutate it in this inventory job.
